title: Canary7
description: Canary7 is the definitive WMS system that allows you streamline all of your fulfilment operations by managing your staff, inventory, order management, picking, putaway, shipping, returns and more.
contribution: Engineered the entire system from the ground up utilizing Angular and Yii2, leading its architectural transformation to a scalable microservices architecture. Implemented a multi-tenant system and integrated third-party APIs to interface with automated picking cranes.

title: Bykea
description: Bykea is your everyday, everything platform. Bykea offers rides on motorbikes, rickshaws, and cars at the lowest fares in Pakistan.
contribution: Engineered core microservices (Fastify, Go) including a centralized address service and card payments gateway. Led the Delivery and Payments vertical, refactoring slow APIs and developing bidding features that were instrumental in achieving company profitability.

title: YouxufkhanNg
description: A stunning Matrix-themed portfolio built with Angular and powered by AI.
contribution: Designed the modular component architecture in Angular, set up the Strapi CMS backend, and strategically leveraged GenAI tools for rapid code generation while handling prompt engineering, refinement, and UI polish.

title: Express Boilerplate Project
description: A boilerplate project for creating Express applications, including necessary files and dependencies to get started quickly.
contribution: Engineered a ready-to-use foundation for new Node.js apps with pre-configured database connections, environment configuration, and logging to eliminate repetitive setup tasks.

title: ValueLink Core
description: ValueLink Core enables AMCs to streamline their appraisal process by automatically assigning orders, managing vendor panels, and delivering reports directly into the system.
contribution: Led the strategic modernization of the application, planning the transition from legacy architecture to a modern stack. Integrated third-party APIs for seamless order inflow and resolved critical production bugs.
